ActiveSync._comment: Only the bootstrap Database and Encryption sections live in config — they are needed to open and decrypt the state database. Everything else defaults in code and is set/overridden from the database via 'eas config set' (the database wins over config). No mail backend ships by default: the gateway starts UNCONFIGURED and is set up with 'eas config set ActiveSync:Backends:MailStore:Provider imap' (Host, ...) and the MailSubmit role.
